analyst_note: Pharma annual report. Strong climate disclosure — SBTi-verified Net-Zero-Standard targets, 98% near-term absolute target on a 2015 baseline, independent sustainability assurance. One MED (assurance level). NOTE: a 2025 China legal matter appears in the external controversy screen — that is a governance/legal item, separate from the sustainability-claim quality assessed by the 8-Test.

specificity.quote: the aim of achieving science-based net zero ... to achieve net zero by 2045
specificity.reasoning: Specific, science-based net-zero commitment with a defined year.

metric.quote: We have a near-term target of 98% absolute [reduction]
metric.reasoning: Quantified absolute reduction target with reported progress (89% achieved Scope 1+2).

baseline.quote: 2015 baseline), part of our Ambition Zero

target.quote: our SBTi-verified Net-Zero Corporate Standard targets in line with SBTi timelines
target.reasoning: Targets verified by the SBTi against its Net-Zero Corporate Standard, 1.5C-aligned.

time_horizon.reasoning: Near-term 2030 ambitions present alongside a 2045 net-zero endpoint.

scope.quote: focused on cutting Scope 3 emissions with [suppliers]
scope.reasoning: Scopes 1, 2 and 3 covered, with a Scope 3 supplier focus.

verification.reasoning: An independent sustainability assurance report is provided; the assurance level is not crisply stated in the extract.

consistency.reasoning: Documented climate transition plan; capital-allocation and capex priorities disclosed; no contradiction surfaced.
